games.title: Baobab Gambit
games.description: A sunset board duel inspired by Fanorona. Capture by approach or withdrawal, chain the same stone across the 5x5 baobab grid, and outfox a tactical AI before the board dries into a standoff.

games.title: Sonar Bloom
games.description: A bioluminescent deep-sea shoot-'em-up. Steer a glowing sub through the abyss, blast anglerfish and jelly swarms, grow your lance with light-cells, and unleash a sonar pulse when a Leviathan rises from the dark.

games.title: Storm Shutters
games.description: A lantern-lit dice puzzle inspired by Shut the Box. Roll the storm dice, seal numbered harbor shutters that match the total, unlock the one-die endgame by closing 7, 8, and 9, and survive as many squalls as you can.

games.title: Astral Sling
games.description: A one-button orbital slingshot across an endless galaxy. Circle a star, release at the perfect instant, and curve through gravity to be caught by the next — chain hops, sweep up stardust, and never drift into the void.

games.title: Comet Carom
games.description: A cosmic flick-and-bank dexterity game. Sling comets off guard posts, knock rogue satellites into the sun or warp docks, and steal ring-hold bonuses before your shot rack runs dry.

games.title: Prism Pop
games.description: A lantern-lit color matching shooter. Bank shots, swap the next orb, and trigger cascading drops before the ceiling shoves the whole stage into the danger line.

games.title: Patch Parade
games.description: A patchwork arcade platformer where every thrown patch can either repair a torn runway or stun a silk moth mid-chase. Keep the parade stitched together while you chase runaway buttons.

games.title: Iron Knockout
games.description: Punch-Out!! style robot boxing. Read the telegraph, dodge the haymaker, and counter your way through the Iron Circuit to the champion's belt.

games.title: Turbo Horizon
games.description: Outrun the clock in a sunset-soaked pseudo-3D racer. Thread traffic at 320 km/h, chase checkpoints from dusk till dawn, and watch the sky burn through a full day-night cycle.
